'''chogapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:weaponised|weaponised]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weaponised|weaponised]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chogapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogapithi|chogapithi]] || [[word:chogapiji|chogapiji]] || [[word:chogapishi|chogapishi]] || [[word:chogapiki|chogapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogaputhuthu|chogaputhuthu]] || [[word:chogapujuju|chogapujuju]] || [[word:chogapushushu|chogapushushu]] || [[word:chogapukuku|chogapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogaputhu|chogaputhu]] || [[word:chogapuju|chogapuju]] || [[word:chogapushu|chogapushu]] || [[word:chogapuku|chogapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogapufthuf|chogapufthuf]] || [[word:chogapufjuf|chogapufjuf]] || [[word:chogapufshuf|chogapufshuf]] || [[word:chogapufkuf|chogapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogapethe|chogapethe]] || [[word:chogapeje|chogapeje]] || [[word:chogapeshe|chogapeshe]] || [[word:chogapeke|chogapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogapothotho|chogapothotho]] || [[word:chogapojojo|chogapojojo]] || [[word:chogaposhosho|chogaposhosho]] || [[word:chogapokoko|chogapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogapotho|chogapotho]] || [[word:chogapojo|chogapojo]] || [[word:chogaposho|chogaposho]] || [[word:chogapoko|chogapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogapofthof|chogapofthof]] || [[word:chogapofjof|chogapofjof]] || [[word:chogapofshof|chogapofshof]] || [[word:chogapofkof|chogapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogapïfthïf|chogapïfthïf]] || [[word:chogapïfjïf|chogapïfjïf]] || [[word:chogapïfshïf|chogapïfshïf]] || [[word:chogapïfkïf|chogapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogapïfthïfthïf|chogapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chogapïfjïfjïf|chogapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chogapïfshïfshïf|chogapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chogapïfkïfkïf|chogapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogapïfthïf|chogapïfthïf]] || [[word:chogapïfjïf|chogapïfjïf]] || [[word:chogapïfshïf|chogapïfshïf]] || [[word:chogapïfkïf|chogapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogapïfthïf|chogapïfthïf]] || [[word:chogapïfjïf|chogapïfjïf]] || [[word:chogapïfshïf|chogapïfshïf]] || [[word:chogapïfkïf|chogapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogapæthæ|chogapæthæ]] || [[word:chogapæjæ|chogapæjæ]] || [[word:chogapæshæ|chogapæshæ]] || [[word:chogapækæ|chogapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogapathatha|chogapathatha]] || [[word:chogapajaja|chogapajaja]] || [[word:chogapashasha|chogapashasha]] || [[word:chogapakaka|chogapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogapatha|chogapatha]] || [[word:chogapaja|chogapaja]] || [[word:chogapasha|chogapasha]] || [[word:chogapaka|chogapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogapafthaf|chogapafthaf]] || [[word:chogapafjaf|chogapafjaf]] || [[word:chogapafshaf|chogapafshaf]] || [[word:chogapafkaf|chogapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chogapasha|chogapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chogapshësha|chogapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chogaprosha|chogaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chogapmusha|chogapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chogapyasha|chogapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochogapnkshësha|gochogapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochogapnkrosha|gochogapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochogapnkmusha|gochogapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochogapnkyasha|gochogapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chogagapasha|chogagapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chogagapshësha|chogagapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chogagaprosha|chogagaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chogagapmusha|chogagapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chogagapyasha|chogagapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochogagapnkshësha|gochogagapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochogagapnkrosha|gochogagapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochogagapnkmusha|gochogagapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochogagapnkyasha|gochogagapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chegæpasha|chegæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chegæpshësha|chegæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chegæprosha|chegæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chegæpmusha|chegæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chegæpyasha|chegæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochegæpnkshësha|gochegæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochegæpnkrosha|gochegæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochegæpnkmusha|gochegæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochegæpnkyasha|gochegæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chogfapasha|chogfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chogfapshësha|chogfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chogfaprosha|chogfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chogfapmusha|chogfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chogfapyasha|chogfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochogfapnkshësha|gochogfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochogfapnkrosha|gochogfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochogfapnkmusha|gochogfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochogfapnkyasha|gochogfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
